name: sessions/7979893028704332984
title: Replace Absolute Paths with Repo-Relative Paths
prompt:
Working in the repo root (MasumRab/kaggle-notebooks-analysis):

1. Do a codebase-wide search for all occurrences of /home/claude/ and ${PROJECT_ROOT}
   across every file (scripts/, .github/workflows/, *.md, *.toml, *.py):
     grep -r "/home/claude/" . --include="*.py" --include="*.toml" \
         --include="*.yml" --include="*.md" -l
     grep -r "\${PROJECT_ROOT}" . -l

   Replace every instance with repo-relative paths.

2. Fix pyproject.toml QA extras specifically:
     "kaggle-qa-toolkit @ file:./tools/kaggle-qa-toolkit",
     "kaggle-forensics @ file:./tools/kaggle_forensics",

3. Check if tools/ is tracked in git:
     git status tools/
   If untracked: git add tools/ && git commit -m "feat: embed QA tools under tools/"

4. Verify the fix works:
     pip install -e ".[qa]"

5. Commit remaining path fixes:
     git add -A
     git commit -m "fix: replace all absolute paths with repo-relative equivalents"
